output.schema_yml_content:
version: 2

models:
  - name: stg_payment_transaction
    description: >
      Staging model for payment transactions from the payment system.
      Each row represents a single payment attempt with status,
      amount, and processor response details.
    columns:
      - name: payment_id
        description: Unique identifier for each payment transaction.
        tests:
          - not_null
          - unique
      - name: order_id
        description: Foreign key to the order associated with this payment.
        tests:
          - not_null
      - name: payment_method
        description: Payment method used (e.g., credit_card, paypal, apple_pay).
        tests:
          - not_null
      - name: amount
        description: Payment amount in the transaction currency.
        tests:
          - not_null
      - name: currency
        description: ISO 4217 currency code for the payment amount.
        tests:
          - not_null
          - accepted_values:
              values: ['USD', 'GBP', 'EUR', 'CAD', 'AUD']
      - name: status
        description: Current status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed, refunded).
        tests:
          - not_null
          - accepted_values:
              values: ['pending', 'completed', 'failed', 'refunded', 'cancelled']
      - name: processor_response_code
        description: Response code returned by the payment processor. May be null for pending payments.
      - name: processor_response_text
        description: Human-readable response message from the payment processor.
      - name: created_at
        description: Timestamp when the payment record was created.
        tests:
          - not_null
      - name: updated_at
        description: Timestamp when the payment record was last updated. May be null if never updated.

decision_log.rationale: Applied testing standards: not_null on non-nullable columns, unique on PK (payment_id), accepted_values on enum columns (currency, status). Nullable columns (processor_response_code, processor_response_text, updated_at) have no not_null test.
